---
title: "Matched Networking Lunches"
date: 2024-02-14
subtitle: "Get inspired from interdisciplinary discussions with like-minded individuals!"
categories: ["Call for Application"]
---


<p style="text-align: center;"><img height="200" width="270" src="images/matchednetworkinglunches.png" alt="matchednetworkinglunches"></p>
<p> Do you take lunch or coffee breaks? Why not poke someone’s brain at the same time and have a stimulating chat?</p>
<p> Register your profile before <strong>14.02.2024</strong> to be matched with another Open Science Center member based on campus location and current needs and interests:</p>
<p> <a href="https://tellmi.psy.lmu.de/formr/matched-networking-lunches">https://tellmi.psy.lmu.de/formr/matched-networking-lunches</a></p>
<div class="g-clear"></div>
